displayName.thai: กินแอปเปิล 1 ลูก

description.arabic: Eat your first apple. A small start to a healthy habit!

description.bulgarian: Eat your first apple. A small start to a healthy habit!
description.czech: Eat your first apple. A small start to a healthy habit!
description.danish: Spis dit første æble. En lille start på en sund vane!

description.english: Eat your first apple. A small start to a healthy habit!
description.finnish: Eat your first apple. A small start to a healthy habit!

description.hungarian: Eat your first apple. A small start to a healthy habit!
description.indonesian: Eat your first apple. A small start to a healthy habit!

description.romanian: Eat your first apple. A small start to a healthy habit!

description.spanish: Come tu primera manzana. ¡Un pequeño comienzo hacia un hábito saludable!

description.thai: กินแอปเปิลลูกแรกของคุณ จุดเริ่มต้นเล็ก ๆ ของนิสัยที่ดีต่อสุขภาพ!

description.ukrainian: Eat your first apple. A small start to a healthy habit!
description.vietnamese: Eat your first apple. A small start to a healthy habit!
